description: Sample profile structure — this is the format AutoApply AI stores after parsing a resume. Upload your own PDF/DOCX at /profile to generate your real profile.

items.content: Java — Core Java, OOPs, Collections, Exception Handling
Selenium WebDriver — Page Object Model, TestNG, Maven
REST Assured — API testing, JSON/XML validation, OAuth
Cucumber BDD — Gherkin, Feature files, Step definitions
SQL — MySQL, PostgreSQL, query writing, database validation
Git — Version control, branching, pull requests, GitHub
Jenkins — CI/CD pipelines, job configuration, build automation

E-commerce Test Automation Framework — Built a comprehensive Page Object Model framework using Java, Selenium WebDriver, and TestNG. Automated 200+ regression test cases achieving 95% pass rate. Integrated with Jenkins CI/CD pipeline for continuous testing.
items.tags: selenium, java, testng, automation, pom, jenkins

items.content: API Testing Suite — Designed REST Assured test framework for microservices API validation. Covered 150+ endpoints with positive and negative test scenarios. Integrated with Cucumber BDD for behaviour-driven test documentation.

QA Engineer at Tech Solutions Pvt Ltd (Jan 2023 – Present, Bengaluru). Developed and maintained Selenium automation scripts for web application testing. Reduced manual testing effort by 60% through automation. Collaborated with developers on defect triage and resolution. Executed regression, smoke, and sanity test suites across sprint cycles.
ISTQB Foundation Level Certification — International Software Testing Qualifications Board, 2023
B.Tech in Food Technology — Vignan's Foundation for Science Technology and Research, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh (2017 – 2021)
